Figure 3: MINI-BEHAVIOR-GRAN Experimental Pipeline. We evaluate the impact of instruction granularity across three VLA action-decoding strategies. During inference time, a dynamic instructor evaluates the current world state to decide available rule set Ra and active rule rt. A rule-based natural language instruction lt is generated accordingly. The process iterates until completion or max steps.
